body.title: Run TheoryOfOperation §8 alignment queries and file gap tickets
body.result: Ran all 4 §8 alignment queries; added 2 new checks (BaseDevice contract, log hierarchy) to §8; filed 4 gap tickets: T-theory-doc-memory-types, T-theory-safety-gates-in-db, T-theory-basedevice-contract-mismatch, T-theory-log-hierarchy-anomalies
body.description:
docs/TheoryOfOperation.md §8 defines 4 DB queries to verify the doc matches the live system. Run all 4, compare results to doc claims, file a ticket for each gap found. This is the intended use of the doc as an alignment artifact.

Queries to run:
1. SELECT memory_type, count(*) FROM clan.memories GROUP BY memory_type — compare to §3.4 type table
2. SELECT id FROM clan.memories WHERE id IN ('SYSCFG_IGOR_TIER5_ENABLED','SYSCFG_IGOR_ARBITER_ENABLED','SYSCFG_IGOR_SELF_EDIT_ENABLED') — should return 0 rows
3. Verify BaseDevice contract fields (start/stop/health/self_test) exist on at least 3 device classes
4. Verify datacenter_logs/<device>/<subsystem>/ hierarchy in use (no flat root logs)

**Affected files:** docs/TheoryOfOperation.md (update §8 with query results), tickets filed for any gaps
**Design rules:** none — this is a doc alignment check
**Scope boundary:** IN — run 4 queries, document results, file gap tickets; OUT — fix the gaps (those get their own tickets)
**Completion criteria:** §8 updated with actual query results dated today; any mismatches between doc and reality have filed tickets
